Original test uses 1D params [12] and 1D indices [2], but torch.gather expects index to have same ndim and compatible shape — here index must be 1D with values in [0,11], but the actual generated index tensor likely contains invalid or inconsistent values causing numerical divergence (max diff 7.0).
